---
title: "Page 5 - Activity Page"
id: "mod001-se01-sec01-sp05"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec01"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---

## Task

_Clearly define the task or exercise for the learner._

## Instructions

_Provide step-by-step instructions on how to complete the activity._

## Output

_Describe what the learner should produce (e.g. "A paragraph summarizing...", "A spreadsheet with...")._

## Optional self-check

_Provide criteria or questions for the learner to check their own work._

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec01-sp04.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 4 - Application Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec01-sp06.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 6 - Reflection Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
